notes:
v2.6.58 — Selective mode: max 4 trades/day + balanced 1:2 reward-risk

- Hard cap of 4 new trades per day (UTC) — forces the bot to take only the best setups
- Re-entries and manual AI trades are exempt from the cap
- Take-profit now targets nearest swing at 1.5R minimum (balanced pro), 2R fallback
- Counter auto-resets each new day; live log shows Daily trades: N/4 used
- Existing users auto-migrated to the 4/day cap on first launch

Note: no bot can guarantee a fixed win rate. This release makes the bot more
selective and keeps reward-risk healthy, which is what grows an account over time.
